FAILUsers can be listedConnectAs a Posit Team administratorsrc/vip_tests/connect/test_users.py::test_list_users0.27sTest procedureGiven Connect is accessible at the configured URLWhen I list all usersThen the user list is not emptyAnd the test user exists in the user listError tracebackCopyfixturefunc = <function check_test_user_in_list at 0x7f5e8aa8f560>
request = <FixtureRequest for <Function test_list_users>>
kwargs = {'test_username': 'testuser', 'user_list': [{'active_time': '2026-05-12T21:33:27Z', 'confirmed': True, 'created_time': '2026-05-12T21:31:52Z', 'email': '', ...}]}

    def call_fixture_func(
        fixturefunc: _FixtureFunc[FixtureValue], request: FixtureRequest, kwargs
    ) -> FixtureValue:
        if inspect.isgeneratorfunction(fixturefunc):
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., Generator[FixtureValue]], fixturefunc)
            generator = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
            try:
                fixture_result = next(generator)
            except StopIteration:
                raise ValueError(f"{request.fixturename} did not yield a value") from None
            finalizer = functools.partial(_teardown_yield_fixture, fixturefunc, generator)
            request.addfinalizer(finalizer)
        else:
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., FixtureValue], fixturefunc)
>           fixture_result = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
                             ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

.venv/lib/python3.13/site-packages/_pytest/fixtures.py:915: 
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ 

user_list = [{'active_time': '2026-05-12T21:33:27Z', 'confirmed': True, 'created_time': '2026-05-12T21:31:52Z', 'email': '', ...}]
test_username = 'testuser'

    @then("the test user exists in the user list")
    def check_test_user_in_list(user_list, test_username):
        expected = test_username.split("@", 1)[0]
        usernames = [u.get("username") for u in user_list]
>       assert expected in usernames, (
            f"Test user {expected!r} (from {test_username!r}) not found in user list: {usernames}"
        )

E       assert 'testuser' in ['__bootstrap_admin__']

2026/05/12 21:35:04.975861681 function (file = if (onefile) "Rplots.pdf" else "Rplot%03d.pdf",
2026/05/12 21:35:04.975868443 width, height, onefile, family, title, fonts, version, paper,
2026/05/12 21:35:04.975906274 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,
2026/05/12 21:35:04.975907627 useKerning, fillOddEven, compress)
2026/05/12 21:35:04.975926863 {
2026/05/12 21:35:04.975927744 initPSandPDFfonts()
2026/05/12 21:35:04.975940789 new <- list()
2026/05/12 21:35:04.975941820 if (!missing(width))
2026/05/12 21:35:04.975954845 new$width <- width
2026/05/12 21:35:04.975955706 if (!missing(height))
2026/05/12 21:35:04.975969322 new$height <- height
2026/05/12 21:35:04.975970143 if (!missing(onefile))
2026/05/12 21:35:04.975985612 new$onefile <- onefile
2026/05/12 21:35:04.975986524 if (!missing(title))
2026/05/12 21:35:04.976000921 new$title <- title
2026/05/12 21:35:04.976001762 if (!missing(fonts))
2026/05/12 21:35:04.976015658 new$fonts <- fonts
2026/05/12 21:35:04.976016540 if (!missing(version))
2026/05/12 21:35:04.976031409 new$version <- version
2026/05/12 21:35:04.976033863 if (!missing(paper))
2026/05/12 21:35:04.976054382 new$paper <- paper
2026/05/12 21:35:04.976055233 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/05/12 21:35:04.976071903 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/05/12 21:35:04.976073797 if (!missing(bg))
2026/05/12 21:35:04.976097292 new$bg <- bg
2026/05/12 21:35:04.976098584 if (!missing(fg))
2026/05/12 21:35:04.976115324 new$fg <- fg
2026/05/12 21:35:04.976116706 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/05/12 21:35:04.976131957 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/05/12 21:35:04.976133339 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/05/12 21:35:04.976155020 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/05/12 21:35:04.976155901 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/05/12 21:35:04.976178583 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/05/12 21:35:04.976179415 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/05/12 21:35:04.976193852 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/05/12 21:35:04.976194623 if (!missing(useKerning))
2026/05/12 21:35:04.976208970 new$useKerning <- useKerning
2026/05/12 21:35:04.976209802 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/05/12 21:35:04.976225291 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/05/12 21:35:04.976226112 if (!missing(compress))
2026/05/12 21:35:04.976240288 new$compress <- compress
2026/05/12 21:35:04.976241050 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/05/12 21:35:04.976261238 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/05/12 21:35:04.976262159 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {
2026/05/12 21:35:04.976279041 enc <- family$encoding
2026/05/12 21:35:04.976304328 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/05/12 21:35:04.976330747 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/05/12 21:35:04.976331829 "default"))
2026/05/12 21:35:04.976347639 old$encoding <- enc
2026/05/12 21:35:04.976348490 family <- family$metrics
2026/05/12 21:35:04.976361975 }
2026/05/12 21:35:04.976362917 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/05/12 21:35:04.976378056 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/05/12 21:35:04.976378937 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/05/12 21:35:04.976393144 if (length(family) == 4L) {
2026/05/12 21:35:04.976393925 family <- c(family, "Symbol.afm")
2026/05/12 21:35:04.976408422 }
2026/05/12 21:35:04.976409194 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/05/12 21:35:04.976421446 }
2026/05/12 21:35:04.976422298 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/05/12 21:35:04.976436844 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]
2026/05/12 21:35:04.976438196 if (is.null(pf))
2026/05/12 21:35:04.976447393 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/05/12 21:35:04.976447824 domain = NA)
2026/05/12 21:35:04.976457232 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/05/12 21:35:04.976457682 }
2026/05/12 21:35:04.976469024 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/05/12 21:35:04.976469915 old$family <- family
2026/05/12 21:35:04.976486236 }
2026/05/12 21:35:04.976487228 version <- old$version
2026/05/12 21:35:04.976496786 versions <- c("1.1", "1.2", "1.3", "1.4", "1.5", "1.6", "1.7",
2026/05/12 21:35:04.976497206 "2.0")
2026/05/12 21:35:04.976505141 if (version %in% versions)
2026/05/12 21:35:04.976505572 version <- as.integer(strsplit(version, "[.]")[[1L]])
2026/05/12 21:35:04.976515060 else stop("invalid PDF version")
2026/05/12 21:35:04.976515480 onefile <- old$onefile
2026/05/12 21:35:04.976524217 if (!checkIntFormat(file))
2026/05/12 21:35:04.976524678 stop(gettextf("invalid 'file' argument '%s'", file),
2026/05/12 21:35:04.976534255 domain = NA)
2026/05/12 21:35:04.976534686 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,
2026/05/12 21:35:04.976544084 old$bg, old$fg, old$width, old$height, old$pointsize,
2026/05/12 21:35:04.976544515 onefile, old$pagecentre, old$title, old$fonts, version[1L],
2026/05/12 21:35:04.976558878 version[2L], old$colormodel, old$useDingbats, old$useKerning,
2026/05/12 21:35:04.976570864 old$fillOddEven, old$compress)
2026/05/12 21:35:04.976571625 invisible()
2026/05/12 21:35:04.976580011 }
